Блок2-12 Рассвет над коттеджным посёлком.scriptText:
Просыпаться здесь — выбор тех, кто покупал на аукционе.

Утренний туман над крышами премиум-домов.

Бассейны, террасы, тишина рассвета.

Твоё утро начинается с земли по цене торгов. Торги Земли.
Блок2-12 Рассвет над коттеджным посёлком.whiskPrompts:
Cinematic HIGH aerial drone shot over ONE modern premium cottage settlement at sunrise: two-story houses with STRICTLY FLAT ROOFS, dark metal and natural stone facades, panoramic windows, wooden terraces, some houses with private pools, a small calm lake in the middle of the settlement, a winding asphalt road, soft morning mist between the houses, warm golden light, NO gable roofs, NO pitched roofs, NO A-frame houses — ALL houses in the settlement share the same flat-roof modern style, photorealistic 4K, no on-screen text, no letters, no flags, no watermark, no old wooden houses, no village --ar 9:16
Drone gliding LOW at rooftop level through THE EXACT SAME settlement as the previous frame — the same two-story flat-roof houses with dark metal and stone facades and panoramic windows, the same lake and winding road in the same positions, morning mist flowing between the houses, warm sunrise, NO gable roofs, NO pitched roofs anywhere, ALL houses identical in style to the previous frame, photorealistic 4K, no on-screen text, no letters, no flags, no watermark, no old wooden houses, no village --ar 9:16
CLOSE aerial three-quarter view over the backyards of THE EXACT SAME settlement — the same two-story flat-roof houses with dark metal and stone facades, private pools with still water and wooden terraces behind them, the same lake visible in the background, calm sunrise, NO gable roofs, NO pitched roofs, houses identical in style and materials to the previous frames, photorealistic 4K, no on-screen text, no letters, no flags, no watermark, no old wooden houses, no village --ar 9:16
HIGH WIDE aerial over THE EXACT SAME whole settlement bathed in golden sunrise light — the same two-story flat-roof houses with dark metal and stone facades, the same lake and the same winding road in the same positions as before, mist dissolving in the valleys behind, scenic countryside, NO gable roofs, NO pitched roofs, NO new house styles appear, photorealistic 4K, no on-screen text, no letters, no flags, no watermark, no old wooden houses, no village --ar 9:16
